title: Coordination Ledger Entry
description: Schema for a single append-only entry in the coordination ledger. Derived from fnd-ledger.md.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when entry was proposed.

author.description: Identifier of the participant proposing this entry. Must match a declared participant.

type.description: What state transition this entry records.

scope.description: The artifact, task, or coordination area this entry concerns.

prior_entries.description: Entry IDs this one depends on or responds to. Empty array for root entries.

summary.description: 1-3 sentences: what happened and why it matters. A new participant should orient from this alone.

detail.description: Full context — reasoning, alternatives considered, constraints. May be omitted from summaries.

confidence.description: Author's honest estimate of this entry's reliability.

foundation_tag.description: Which foundations are relevant. Used for diagnosis when circuit breakers fire.

signal_envelope.description: Optional. The signal that triggered this entry, preserved for lineage tracing.

task_response.description: Present when this entry records a task acceptance or refusal.

suggested_participant.description: On refusal: what kind of participant might succeed.

resource_snapshot.description: Resource state at time of entry. Feeds Balance tracking.
